fields.name: Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the entry, as assigned from the specified number series when the entry was created.

fields.name: Entry Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of entry.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the document number on the resource ledger entry.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the entry was posted.

fields.name: Resource No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the resource.

fields.name: Resource Group No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the resource group.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the posted entry.

fields.name: Work Type Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies which work type the resource applies to. Prices are updated based on this entry.

fields.name: Job No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the related project.

fields.name: Unit of Measure Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies how each unit of the item or resource is measured, such as in pieces or hours. By default, the value in the Base Unit of Measure field on the item or resource card is inserted.

fields.name: Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of units of the item or resource specified on the line.

fields.name: Direct Unit Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost of one unit of the selected item or resource.

fields.name: Unit Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost of one unit of the item or resource on the line.

fields.name: Total Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total cost of the posted entry.

fields.name: Unit Price
fields.tooltip: Specifies the price of one unit of the item or resource. You can enter a price manually or have it entered according to the Price/Profit Calculation field on the related card.

fields.name: Total Price
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total price of the posted entry.

fields.name: Global Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the global dimension that is linked to the record or entry for analysis purposes. Two global dimensions, typically for the company's most important activities, are available on all cards, documents, reports, and lists.

fields.name: Global Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the global dimension that is linked to the record or entry for analysis purposes. Two global dimensions, typically for the company's most important activities, are available on all cards, documents, reports, and lists.

fields.name: User ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the user who posted the entry, to be used, for example, in the change log.

fields.name: Source Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the source code that specifies where the entry was created.

fields.name: Chargeable
fields.tooltip: Specifies if a resource transaction is chargeable.

fields.name: Journal Batch Name
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the name of the journal where the entry was posted.
The name is copied from the Journal Batch Name field on the journal line.
You cannot change the name because the entry has been posted.

fields.name: Reason Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the reason code, a supplementary source code that enables you to trace the entry.

fields.name: Gen. Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the general business posting group that applies to the entry.

fields.name: Gen. Prod. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the general product posting group that applies to the entry.

fields.name: Document Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies an alternative to the posting date. This is useful, when you intend to specify a date other than the posting date. The field contains the posting date as a default.

fields.name: External Document No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the external document number for this entry.
If the entry was posted from a journal line, the number is copied from the External Document No. field on the journal line.
You cannot change the external document number because the entry has already been posted.

fields.name: No. Series
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the number series to which the document number on this entry belongs.
You cannot change the No. Series field because the entry has been posted.

fields.name: Source Type
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the source type that applies to the source number shown in the Source No. field.
If the entry was posted from a resource journal line, the field is blank.
If the entry was posted from a sales line, the field contains Customer.

fields.name: Source No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies where the entry originates from.
If the entry was posted from a resource journal line, the field is empty.
If the entry was posted from an order, invoice, or credit memo, the sell-to customer number is copied from the sales line to the field.

fields.name: Qty. per Unit of Measure
fields.tooltip: Specifies the base quantity per resource base unit of measure specified in the Qty. per Unit of Measure field.

fields.name: Quantity (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the posted quantity that is calculated into base unit of measure.

fields.name: Order Type
fields.tooltip:
Shows which type of order that the entry was created in. You can select from the following options:

<Blank> when the entry comes from any other transaction than the following options

Production

Transfer

Service

Assembly

fields.name: Order No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the number of the order that created the entry.
The type of order is defined by the related Order Type field.

fields.name: Order Line No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the line number of the order that created the entry.
The type of order is defined by the related Order Type field.

fields.name: Dimension Set ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies a reference to a combination of dimension values. The actual values are stored in the Dimension Set Entry table.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 3 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 3, which is one of dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 4 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 4, which is one of dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 5 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 5, which is one of dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 6 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 6, which is one of dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 7 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 7, which is one of dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 8 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 8, which is one of dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.
